name: Green Office Strategic Plan Evidence
description: Evidence demonstrating the Green Office 2026 strategic planning and approval process.
criteria: GO-CRITERIA-01: Approved strategic plan must be in place

name: Green Office Quarterly Progress Evidence
description: Quarterly progress reports demonstrating ongoing Green Office activities and KPI tracking.
criteria: GO-CRITERIA-02: Regular progress reporting is required

name: RAE Assessment Guidance Evidence
description: Evidence that RAE assessment preparation guidance is available to faculty.
criteria: RAE-CRITERIA-01: Faculty must have access to assessment preparation materials
notes: Guide published and available on RAE landing page.

name: RAE Evidence Submission Template Evidence
description: Evidence that standardized submission templates are available for RAE evidence collection.
criteria: RAE-CRITERIA-02: Standardized evidence submission process must exist

name: Learning Center Course Catalog Evidence
description: Evidence that the Learning Center offers a published catalog of courses and workshops.
criteria: LC-CRITERIA-01: Course catalog must be published and accessible

name: Learning Center Annual Performance Evidence
description: Annual performance data demonstrating Learning Center activities and outcomes.
criteria: LC-CRITERIA-02: Annual performance reporting is required
